title: Reolink 4K PoE CCTV Camera Systems 8CH with 2TB HDD NVR and 4 X 8MP Home Security IP Cameras with Person/Vehicle Detection for 24/7 Recording Night Vision, RLK8-800D4
features: SMART PERSON/VEHICLE DETECTION: Smart PoE IP cameras can identify people and vehicles in terms of their shapes, minimizing unwanted alerts such as animals or shadows. Cameras can also be configured to specify the type of detection when sending alerts to you. Know what happened simply by glancing at the lock screen

4K ULTRA HD VIDEO: Reolink PoE IP outdoor camera captures videos of 3840*2160 resolution, which is 4 times the clarity of a 1080p camera. You can see crucial details clearly, like faces and logos. With the built-in microphone, cameras can also pick up ambient sound for an extra layer of security

EASY SETUP WITH POE TECHNOLOGY: A simple PoE connection makes it easier to set up and installs your home security camera system. With a single network cable for both power supply and video signal transmission, stretching up to 330ft, users can enjoy smooth security coverage of their entire house. This is perfect for both beginners and DIY camera enthusiasts

24/7 RECORDING CEASELESS PROTECTION: This 4K PoE video surveillance kit supports 24/7 continuous recording of all cameras. You will have an all-day video without missing a beat. The video will be stored in the pre-installed 2TB HDD. You can even install an external hard drive (up to 8TB) to expand storage space, a storage capacity of up to 16TB.

COMPATIBLE WITH VARIOUS Reolink IP CAMERAS: The 4K CCTV security camera system can be expanded up to an 8-camera kit with any Reolink PoE IP cameras o WiFi Camera without any compatibility issue. Supported Reolink 16MP/8MP/5MP/4MP IP cameras include: RLC-520A, 510A, 810A, 820A, 823A, 811A, 823S1, DUO 3 POE, TrackMix PoE,, 410W, 510WA, etc.
description: Product Description Reolink 8MP CCTV Security Camera System Intelligent 4K UHD CCTV System for Complete Surveillance Magnificent Viewing Experience with Rich Details and Vivid Colors Previous page Identify True Threats More accurate alert and less distraction, thanks to the intelligent human/vehicle detection. Never Miss Any Alert Personalize settings to receive necessary alerts in various ways like email, app push & NVR buzzer. Quick Access in Playback Multiple detection options to filter videos, saving time and effort to find out important clips. Share with Families or Friends 12 users can view the live feed at the same time, and max. 19 user accounts can be added. Peace of Mind Anywhere Access live view and video playback via FREE Reolink App/Client on your smartphone and computer. Next page 1 Human/Vehicle Detection 2 Real-Time Notification 3 Smart Playback Filter 4 Live View for 12 Users 5 Reliable Remote Access IP67 Certified Weatherproof With the rugged housing and body, you can place the security camera anywhere, outdoors or indoors. The PoE camera can provide you with all-weather protection, rain or shine, hot or cold. Data Encryption & Cyber Security AWS server is used to achieve remote access and Reolink servers are not involved at all. No customer data will be left to us. All data are dynamically encrypted and well protected. Easy PoE Installation, 24/7 Continuous Recording Power, video, and audio running through one single PoE cable, installation is made a lot simpler. The NVR comes with a pre-installed 2TB HDD and supports HDDs up to 16TB in total. 4K PoE Surveillance Security Camera System Specifications 4X 8MP PoE IP Camera Specifications Image Sensor: 1/2.49" CMOS Sensor (8 Megapixel) Lens: f=4.0mm fixed, F=2.0, with IR Cut Angle of View: Horizontal: 87°; Vertical: 44° IR Distance: 30 Meters (100 ft) (LED: 18pcs/14mil/850nm) Power Input: DC12V 1A or 48V PoE( IEEE 802.3af),<12W Frame Rate: Main Stream 2fps - 20fps(default: 20fps), Sub Stream 4fps - 15fps(default: 10fps) Microphone: Built-in Microphone RLN8-410 PoE NVR Specifications IP Video Input: supports 8 IP cameras Video Output: Monitor or HDTV via VGA, HDMI Video Format: H.265 USB Port: USB 2.0 x 2 Synchronous Playback: 1CH-8MP; 4CH-4MP HDD Installed: Pre-installed a 2TB HDD HDD Capacity: 1x internal port, 1x external port, 8TB for each port (support up to 16TB in total) Q: Can I add wireless cameras to this CCTV camera system? A: Yes, you can add Reolink WiFi cameras to the NVR, such as RLC-410W / RLC-511W / E1 / E1 Pro / E1 Zoom / Lumus, etc. The total number of cameras connected to this NVR should not exceed 8. Q: What are the advantages of human/vehicle motion detection compared with traditional motion detection? A: Compared with motion detection based on pixel changes, Human and Vehicle Detection, which cameras support, can help to reduce false alerts effectively. Q: How does this 4K security camera system alert you when in an emergency? A: The security camera will notify you instantly via email alerts and push notifications when used independently. When you use the PoE camera with NVR, the NVR can also sound the built-in buzzer to alert you.
